items.title: ROS2 Studio Update
items.summary:
ROS2-STUDIO update— new Bag Recorder features!

Just pushed some improvements to the bag recorder in ROS2-STUDIO:

Storage format selection — choose between sqlite3 and mcap directly from the GUI
Timed recording — set a duration (in seconds) and the recorder auto-stops when done
Batch/split recor

items.title: Looking for a repository within ROS2 to support
items.summary:
Hello guys, I have history with C, python and have worked with ROS2 and ROS2 controls, for Control Theory stuff. I would like to be involved in supporting a repository or a stable project. Kindly recommend a starting point. You can also check my github to see if I woul be suitable for your project at KevinKipkorir254.

items.title: QERRA-v2 Classical — deterministic ethical + physical-safety evaluation for Behavior Trees (no ROS2 build required)
items.summary:
HELLO ROS COMMUNITY!

I’ve been building an open-source project called QERRA-v2 Classical — a deterministic, fully explainable ethical evaluation layer (SEMEV-12, 12 vectors covering things like coercion, autonomy violation, harm intent) plus a lightweight physical-safety companion layer (QERRA-HSR — detects acute distress, isolation, e
